reasoning: The SC-7-a control focuses on monitoring and controlling communications at the boundary, which in Kubernetes can be mapped to network security configurations. NetworkPolicies in Kubernetes can enforce ingress and egress rules to restrict traffic, similar to cloud security groups or NACLs. Additionally, restricting the use of LoadBalancer services and enabling TLS for Ingress controllers helps control and secure external communications.
